page_content:
MATH630 Real Analysis | (3 Credits)

Lebesgue measure and the Lebesgue integral on R, differentiation of functions of bounded variation, absolute continuity and fundamental theorem of calculus, Lp spaces on R, Riesz-Fischer theorem, bounded linear functionals on Lp, measure and outer measure, Fubini’s theorem. Prerequisite: MATH411; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
